evals.prompt: Fix the typo in the error message in user.service.ts line 42 — it says 'Uzer' instead of 'User'.
evals.expected_output: Claude classifies as small change, implements directly with Edit, launches code-reviewer agent, delivers.
expectations: Claude announces routing decision containing 'Small change' before implementing
Claude implements with Edit or Write tools (not mcp__codex__codex)
Claude does NOT call mcp__codex__codex for implementation
Claude launches a code-reviewer Task agent (feature-dev:code-reviewer) after implementation
Claude delivers with a table showing Route: Small (Claude)

evals.prompt: Add a caching layer with Redis to the user service, session service, and product service — including connection pooling, cache invalidation, and TTL configuration.
evals.expected_output: Claude classifies as large change, reads codex-architect-role.md, routes to Codex via MCP, launches code-reviewer after.
expectations: Claude announces routing decision containing 'Large change' before implementing
Claude reads codex-architect-role.md from the skill directory
Claude calls mcp__codex__codex with sandbox set to 'workspace-write'
The Codex call includes developer-instructions from codex-architect-role.md
Claude launches a code-reviewer Task agent after Codex implementation
Claude delivers with a table showing Route: Large (Codex)

evals.prompt: Refactor the authentication middleware to use async/await instead of callbacks, update all 4 route files that import it, and add proper error handling.
evals.expected_output: Claude classifies as large, detects Codex is unavailable, falls back to Route A (Claude direct implementation) instead of stopping.
expectations: Claude classifies this as a large change (4+ files, new logic)
Claude checks for mcp__codex__codex availability
Claude announces fallback: 'Codex unavailable' and falls back to direct implementation
Claude does NOT stop or tell the user to add Codex — it proceeds with Route A
Claude launches code-reviewer Task agent after implementation
Claude delivers successfully despite Codex being unavailable

evals.prompt: Add a new 'preferences' column to the users table and update the user model, migration, seed file, and API response serializer.
evals.expected_output: Claude classifies as large (4 files), dispatches per-task subagents since there are 4+ implementation tasks.
expectations: Claude identifies 4+ implementation tasks and dispatches Task subagents
Claude records git SHA before each subagent (git rev-parse HEAD)
Each subagent gets the mcp__codex__codex tool and codex-architect-role.md instructions
Claude runs git diff after each subagent to verify scoped changes
Claude launches code-reviewer after all subagents complete (not mcp__codex__codex-reply)
Claude notes that each subagent owns its own Codex threadId
